privileged_info_summary: Verified that the historical event referenced is Operation Neptune Spear at Abbottabad (coordinates approx. 34.17 degrees N, 73.24 degrees E) on May 1, 2011 at 18:00 UTC, which correctly matches historical records of the raid's launch time. The expected mathematical conversion of the required longitude (73.24 degrees) is 1.27828 radians, revealing a very slight precision error in the metadata's claim of 1.27829 rad. The expected output report path (/home/ga/Desktop/illumination_report.txt) and screenshot directory (/home/ga/Pictures/stellarium) match exactly with the task environment export logic.
